app.title: Tower Map
app.introTooltip: Interactive Leaflet map; click a country to filter like Forebears; click a tower for a 3D model (Three.js).
app.subtitle: Simplified 3D models — not official architectural scenes.
app.errorBanner: Could not load data. Make sure the API server and MongoDB are running, then run:
app.noData: No data. Seed the database on the server.

map.legendFiltered: Filtered: {{country}} only. Click the same country again to clear the filter.
map.legendHint: Click a country to show only towers there; click a point for 3D.
map.geoError: Could not load country outlines (network / CORS).

seo.metaDescription: Explore the world’s tallest skyscrapers on an interactive world map. Filter towers by country, compare heights, and open simplified 3D building previews powered by Leaflet and Three.js.
seo.metaKeywords: skyscrapers, tall buildings, interactive map, Leaflet, Three.js, MERN, tower map, world tallest buildings, 3D buildings, architecture map
seo.llmSummary: Tower Map is a multilingual web application (English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Chinese, Japanese, Arabic) that visualizes notable skyscrapers on a Leaflet map. Users filter by clicking a country, view metadata, and see a stylized Three.js 3D block model per tower. Backend: Node/Express with MongoDB. Public URLs support ?lang= codes for each locale. A machine-readable overview is at /llms.txt.
